profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal data and login credentials.
profile.personalDataHint: Update your name and email address.
profile.name: Name
profile.passwordHint: Choose a secure password of at least 8 characters.
profile.customInstructionsHint: Added to the assistant's base prompt in all your chats. Use this space to indicate your role, communication preferences or usual context.
profile.systemPromptPlaceholder:
I'm an AI assistant supporting my team.
I prefer concise answers with numerical data.
I always cite sources.
profile.tokenCountHint: Show the input/output tokens under each assistant reply.
profile.pwdTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters

memory.title: Persistent memory
memory.intro: If enabled, the assistant automatically learns durable facts about you (preferences, role, technologies) and remembers them across chats. Each fact requires your confirmation before being stored.
memory.autoMemoryHint: Automatic fact extraction at the end of the conversation.
memory.thresholdHint: Number of new messages before an automatic extraction. Empty = use the global default.
memory.noFacts: No facts yet. They'll be proposed during conversations.
memory.mergeProposal: Merge: will replace the original notes
memory.graphHint: Hover a node to read the note. Links come from the evolution job.

usage.title: Usage
usage.subtitleAdmin: Token consumption and estimated costs, aggregated by user, project and model.
usage.subtitleUser: Your token consumption, by project and model.
usage.noData: No consumption recorded in the selected period.
usage.costNote: Costs are estimates based on the prices set for each LLM configuration (AI System → LLM Provider) and provider-specific cache multipliers. Messages from models without a price appear as "—".
usage.servingSubtitle: Call-level metrics (all callers: chat, automations, flows, teams). Latency, errors and throughput per configuration.
usage.servingNoData: No LLM calls recorded in the selected window.
usage.servingTimelineCaption: Calls per interval, from {{from}} to {{to}}. Red = intervals with errors. Hover for details.
usage.servingLiveHint: Live dispatcher snapshot (refreshed every 5s). "—" = config without a concurrency cap (pass-through).

ai.title: AI System
ai.subtitle: Maintenance operations and AI engine configuration.

sandbox.adminSubtitle: Enable the tool that runs arbitrary code/shell in an isolated container. Powerful capability: keep it restricted to trusted projects/teams.
sandbox.enableHint: Global master switch. When off, the tool is available to no one.
sandbox.netNoneDesc: Maximum isolation: code cannot reach any network.
sandbox.netInternalDesc: Only the platform's internal API (backend), no internet access.
sandbox.netInternetDesc: Backend + only allowlisted domains via the egress proxy (descriptive skills must declare their domains).
sandbox.netOpenDesc: Backend + unrestricted network access, no allowlist (needed for ad-hoc curl/HTTP).
sandbox.openWarning: Open internet on arbitrary code: exfiltration risk. Also requires the docker network in BROKER_ALLOWED_NETWORKS.
sandbox.execHardenedDesc: Read-only root filesystem, non-root user, all capabilities dropped. Maximum isolation.
sandbox.execTrustedDesc: The code runs as root on a writable filesystem, so it can install system libraries at runtime (apt-get). Changes are lost when the container exits.
sandbox.execTrustedWarning: Weaker isolation: only for trusted teams/projects. Also requires BROKER_ALLOW_PRIVILEGED_SANDBOX=1 on the broker; otherwise it falls back to hardened.
sandbox.allowlistHint: Admins are always authorized. A user passes if they belong to an authorized team or the chat is in an authorized project.
sandbox.runtimeInProcessDesc: Code runs as a local process with full access to the host filesystem. A deliberate development choice: do not use it with untrusted users.
sandbox.runtimeBroker: Isolated execution via broker (container per job)

dsSecurity.title: DataSource security (anti-SSRF)
dsSecurity.subtitle: Restricts which hosts DataSources/DB tools may connect to. Prevents using a DataSource to reach internal services or the cloud metadata endpoint.
dsSecurity.metadataNote: The cloud metadata endpoint (169.254.169.254 / IPv6 link-local) is always blocked, regardless of these settings.
dsSecurity.allowPrivateHint: Needed for self-hosted DBs on LAN or localhost. Turn off to allow only public hosts (plus the allowlist) for untrusted multi-tenant deployments.
dsSecurity.allowlistHint: Hosts, IPs or CIDRs allowed even when private hosts are disabled. One per line (or comma-separated).

toolLoading.adminSubtitle: Controls how many tools and with what level of detail they are injected into the agent's prompt. Reduces context tokens when using many tools.
toolLoading.userSubtitle: Customize how tools are loaded into your context. Overrides the global default for your account only.
toolLoading.strategyAlwaysDesc: Inject all tools on every request. Ideal if you have few tools (< 10).
toolLoading.strategyTopKDesc: Semantically select the K most relevant tools for the user's message. Optimal with many tools.
toolLoading.strategyAutoDesc: If tools are ≤ threshold use "Always all", otherwise switch to RAG.
toolLoading.formatFullDesc: Complete JSON schema with all descriptions. Maximum compatibility.
toolLoading.formatCompressedDesc: Only the first sentence of the description; parameter schema unchanged. ~50-70% fewer tokens per tool.
toolLoading.formatDeferredDesc: Tool with minimal description; full list injected in prompt. SKILL.md loaded on-demand via get_tool_instructions. ~80-90% fewer tokens per tool.
toolLoading.conversationMemoryHint: Limits how much conversation history is sent to the model on each request. Low values save tokens; high values keep more context. Global default, overridable per user.
toolLoading.conversationMemoryHintUser: Limits how much history is sent to the model. Low values save tokens; high values keep longer context. The global default is configured by the admin (typically 6,000 tok).
toolLoading.conversationMemoryUnitUser: max history tokens (500–32 000; empty = global default)
toolLoading.compactInsteadHint: Beyond the threshold, older turns are summarized by the summarizer model and the summary stays in context — no memory lost. If off, old turns are simply truncated.
toolLoading.compactionThresholdHint: Compaction triggers when history exceeds this % of {{budget}} tokens. Lower = more frequent and aggressive compression. The model generating summaries is set with the ✨ button in the "LLM Provider" panel.
toolLoading.persistentMemoryHint: Global default extraction threshold: every how many new messages the agent tries to extract durable facts about the user. Each user can enable memory and override this threshold from their profile.
toolLoading.globalDefaultDesc: Use the configuration set by the admin.
toolLoading.globalFormatDesc: Use the format set by the admin.

llm.sectionHintPre: Define one or more LLM models. The one marked as
llm.noConfigs: No configurations. Add the first one.
llm.apiKeyOptionalHint: optional: only if the server requires a token
llm.formPriceCacheHint: Cache prices from the provider's price list; if empty, the estimate falls back to default multipliers on the input price.
llm.apiKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current key
llm.providerAnthropicDesc: Cloud API — requires an API key
llm.providerOpenAiDesc: Cloud API — requires an API key
llm.providerGeminiDesc: Cloud API — requires an API key
llm.providerOllamaDesc: Local — runs on your machine via Ollama
llm.providerLmStudioDesc: Local — runs on your machine via LM Studio
llm.providerDeepSeekDesc: Cloud API — requires an API key
llm.formMaxConcurrencyHint: empty = unlimited. Set a cap on self-hosted models: excess requests are queued (chat gets priority).

systemPrompt.title: System base prompt
systemPrompt.subtitle: The assistant's global system prompt. It is prepended to the user's and project's custom instructions. Changes take effect immediately, without redeployment.
systemPrompt.savedOk: Base prompt updated! Active from the next request.

files.title: Files
files.subtitle: Manage all uploaded files: re-indexing, deletion and RAG status.
files.defaultCollectionHint: Leave on Default collection to use the one configured by the admin.

transcription.title: Voice transcription (Whisper)
transcription.subtitle: Enable the microphone button in chat. Audio is transcribed to text by an OpenAI-compatible Whisper endpoint (cloud or self-hosted) and is never saved to disk.
transcription.enableDesc: Show the microphone button in the message composer for all users.
transcription.providerInternalDesc: Whisper service bundled with the app — ready to use
transcription.providerGroqDesc: Groq cloud — very fast and cheap
transcription.internalInfoDesc: Uses the Whisper service bundled with the app. URL and model are detected automatically — nothing to configure. Press "Test" to check the active model.
transcription.apiKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the current key
transcription.connectionFailed: Connection to the transcription endpoint failed

vectordb.title: Vector Database
vectordb.subtitle: Configure the vector database and the embedding model used to index documents.
vectordb.connStringHint: Must point to a PostgreSQL with the
vectordb.collectionsSubtitle: Organise documents into separate collections. Only one can be the default.
vectordb.collectionsEmpty: No collections — create one to get started.
vectordb.collectionCreateSearchTool: Also create the semantic search tool
vectordb.collectionCreateSearchToolHint: Shared (org) tool to search the documents of this collection. It can be edited or deleted from the Tools page.
vectordb.activeCollectionSubtitle: New documents are indexed in this collection. Semantic search happens here by default.
vectordb.activeCollectionWarningBody: Changing the active collection does not move already-indexed documents. You will need to re-index all files for them to be available in the new collection.
vectordb.embeddingSubtitle: Model used to generate vectors during indexing and semantic search. Changing this configuration invalidates existing vectors if the dimension changes.
vectordb.embeddingQueryPrefixHint: Prepended to the search question only, never to the indexed documents. Empty = no prefix.
vectordb.embeddingQueryPrefixHintInternal: Empty = the search prompt declared by the model itself is used (already correct for the model in use). Fill this in only to force a different one: it then takes precedence. Prepended to the question only, never to the indexed documents.
vectordb.providerQdrantDesc: Open-source vector DB — local or Qdrant Cloud
vectordb.providerChromaDesc: Open-source vector DB — local or Chroma Cloud
vectordb.providerAstraDbDesc: Managed vector DB on DataStax Astra
vectordb.embeddingProviderInternalDesc: Service bundled with the app — ready to use
vectordb.embeddingProviderOpenAiDesc: Cloud embeddings — requires an API key
vectordb.embeddingProviderVoyageDesc: Cloud embeddings — requires an API key
vectordb.embeddingInternalInfoDesc: Uses the embedding microservice bundled with the app. URL, model and dimensions are detected automatically — nothing to configure. Press "Test" to check the active model.
